nasb.text: So Jethro said, “Blessed be the Lord who delivered you from the hand of the Egyptians and from the hand of Pharaoh, and who delivered the people from under the hand of the Egyptians.

esv.text: Jethro said, “Blessed be the Lord, who has delivered you out of the hand of the Egyptians and out of the hand of Pharaoh and has delivered the people from under the hand of the Egyptians.

cnv.text: 葉忒羅說：“耶和華是應當稱頌的，他拯救了你們脫離埃及人的手和法老的手；他也把這人民從埃及人的手下拯救出來。

ccb.text: 便说：“耶和华当受称颂，因为祂从埃及人和法老手中拯救了你们，把这百姓从埃及人手中拯救了出来。
